rulings.Case Title: CHIA-PI TIEN VS. LEONIE ASHLEY OOSTROM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs On Appeal Filed September 25, 2018
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LEONIE OOSTROM Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs On Appeal Filed September 25, 2018 GRANTED in the amount of $7,146. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF THEDA FUNG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support continued to October 9, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than September 16, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA DINS VS. CARDENAS THREE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF TATIANA DINS Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint Hearing Required to address the delay in advancing the action by the new counsel from December 2018 to August 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TATIANA DINS VS. CARDENAS THREE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT CARDENAS THREE A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication Hearing Required. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT PROGRESSIVE PROPERTY GROUP, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address paragraph 13 of the Settlement Agreement, Kaufman and Geraghty. Specifically, Plaintiff shall address in good faith why these cases are not applicable to the facts at bar. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACI GRACE VS. ALVIN BAUM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ALVIN BAUM, ALVIN BAUM DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address paragraph 13 of the Settlement Agreement, Kaufman and Geraghty. Specifically, Plaintiff shall address in good faith why these cases are not applicable to the facts at bar. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN CAMPBELL ET AL VS. PACIFIC ARMS GOUGH STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To File A Second Amended Complaint To Substitute Sun Property Management As The True Name Of Doe 1
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN CAMPBELL, MAXWELL MCINTIRE Notice Of Motion And Motion To File A Second Amended Complaint To Substitute Sun Property Management As The True Name Of Doe 1 is GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL OROPEZA VS. BRANDIE OLESEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 11, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL OROPEZA Re-Notice Of Motion For Order Authorizing Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation And Judgment Hearing Required. Defendants and Plaintiff to be present. = (501/CFH)
